extraction.one_line_summary: EWEN Caleb won stage 3 sprint after PHILLIPS Jasper crashed and Lotto-Soudal controlled finale positioning perfectly on right side of road
tactical_patterns: Lotto-Soudal positioned right side while VANPOPPEL opened left, creating easy speed-match for EWEN indicating road-side choice critical
VAN HOOVERDINK's late attack controlled by LAMPAERT shows Deceuninck still protecting EVENEPOEL's 45-second teammate gap despite sprint stage
BONIFAZIO and ACKERMANN both on EWEN's wheel suggests sprinter trains converging rather than separate team leadouts in finale

rider_signals.PHILLIPS Jasper: negative: crashed with teammate SBARAGLI, knee injury significant enough to raise sprint form doubts for subsequent stages
rider_signals.VANPOPPEL Danny: negative: opened sprint early from left side, easily matched by EWEN suggesting poor positioning choice or mistimed effort
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: extended teammate gap to 45 seconds on VANHOUCKE without working, suggesting team willing to sacrifice sprint stage control for GC cushion
